'''鈭歴-m-ch-ch''' ('''kasamchechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lanken|lanken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lanken|lanken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-m-ch-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kasamchechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisamchechoko|thisamchechoko]] || [[word:jisamchechoko|jisamchechoko]] || [[word:shisamchechoko|shisamchechoko]] || [[word:kisamchechoko|kisamchechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusamchechoko|thuthusamchechoko]] || [[word:jujusamchechoko|jujusamchechoko]] || [[word:shushusamchechoko|shushusamchechoko]] || [[word:kukusamchechoko|kukusamchechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosamchechoko|thosamchechoko]] || [[word:josamchechoko|josamchechoko]] || [[word:shosamchechoko|shosamchechoko]] || [[word:kosamchechoko|kosamchechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosamchechoko|thosamchechoko]] || [[word:josamchechoko|josamchechoko]] || [[word:shosamchechoko|shosamchechoko]] || [[word:kosamchechoko|kosamchechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙samchechoko|th忙samchechoko]] || [[word:j忙samchechoko|j忙samchechoko]] || [[word:sh忙samchechoko|sh忙samchechoko]] || [[word:k忙samchechoko|k忙samchechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasamchechoko|thasamchechoko]] || [[word:jasamchechoko|jasamchechoko]] || [[word:shasamchechoko|shasamchechoko]] || [[word:kasamchechoko|kasamchechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasamchechoko|thasamchechoko]] || [[word:jasamchechoko|jasamchechoko]] || [[word:shasamchechoko|shasamchechoko]] || [[word:kasamchechoko|kasamchechoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
